{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220404112BDD9D016B9967F12470"}"},"total":80},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7603823063817913112","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"看正文之前有看书评的习惯，除了一些是指出有点瑕疵，但是普遍都是好评，说实话作者这个标题不大吸引人，再结合文案还有点云里雾里，结果看下来发现剧情真的就是那么好看！
关于灾难天马行空的想象和对人性在绝望侵扰下真实却点到即止的描写，整体都是读起来很舒爽畅快的体验，目前为止的情节设置真的无敌了，就连书评区略微诟病的人物塑造方面也是相得益彰的一环，出场角色个性都很鲜明！看到的部分在番茄里真得是仙草了，连夜追平欲罢不能啊！速更，夜不能寐！"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1770409691,"group_id":"7590661718972304409","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"赛博炫压抑的作者可以和我玩sm","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N+BUYQKBl/IMV00qJaqhOWk9zJxbMxuLDNFrAXD77/bb","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/8b91e01a7b0242389b43128fe854e4b7~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"1207697487445114","user_name":"番茄被卸载"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1207697487445114","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7590661718972304409","book_info":{"abstract":"【刚出评分】
阮墨的破毛笔给了他一条末日预警。
结果丧尸就爆发了！
还没来得及囤物资的阮墨怒摔金手指：
这查看记忆的破能力有屁用？！
但蚊子再小也是肉。
阮墨从一个个记忆片段中，拼出这场危机的真相。
越来越多的能力者出现，物资复制、大地操控、肢体融合……
他们在末世下的生存方式也打破了阮墨的认知。
独立空间、地下宫殿、影子堡垒、千足蜈蚣……
阮墨坐在打造好的装甲房车里，看着窗外漫天的婴儿雨。
残肢断臂噼里啪啦地打在车顶的声音与婴儿的哭声混合在一起。
真正的末日恐怕才刚开始……","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/82d52cdd6bde18b91c3632df42e22974~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"大大泡泡王","author_id":"","book_id":"7590661718972304409","book_name":"世界崩坏：灾难超出我的想象","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#082830","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"1619人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":8,"name":"科幻末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=8&name=科幻末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":68,"name":"末世","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=68&name=末世&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":515,"name":"末日求生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=515&name=末日求生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":871,"name":"第一人称","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=871&name=第一人称&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":852,"name":"魂穿","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=852&name=魂穿&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":522,"name":"打脸","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=522&name=打脸&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7590661722407436825","read_count":"1619","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"488609"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"5.7","serial_count":"226","tags":"科幻末世,末世,末日求生,第一人称,魂穿,打脸","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/9e71b64a38ef6bff04691f6090d14c85~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779307451&x-signature=TOa3l8f6pi2jeabHEpBQJ4z7IvE%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"910036141093176","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"98"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603220404112BDD9D016B9967F12470"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读2小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":12,"forward
